items.definition_en: A shovel is a tool used for digging or moving soil.
items.example_en: He used a shovel to plant the tree.

items.definition_en: A rake is a tool with long teeth for collecting leaves or smoothing soil.
items.example_en: She cleaned the garden with a rake.

items.definition_en: A spade is a tool with a flat blade for digging.
items.example_en: He used a spade to dig a hole for the flowers.

items.definition_en: A watering can is a container for pouring water on plants.
items.example_en: He filled the watering can to water the flowers.

items.definition_en: A wheelbarrow is a small cart with one wheel for carrying things.
items.example_en: She put the weeds in the wheelbarrow.

items.definition_en: Gloves are clothing for your hands to protect them.
items.example_en: He wore gloves while pulling out the weeds.

items.definition_en: A bucket is a container with a handle for carrying water or soil.
items.example_en: She used a bucket to carry water to the garden.

items.definition_en: A garden fork is a tool with long prongs for turning soil.
items.example_en: He used the garden fork to mix the soil.

items.definition_en: Secateurs are small scissors for cutting plants.
items.example_en: She trimmed the roses with secateurs.

items.definition_en: A sprinkler is a device for watering the grass or plants.
items.example_en: They set up a sprinkler to water the lawn.

items.definition_en: A lawn mower is a machine for cutting grass.
items.example_en: He pushed the lawn mower across the yard.

items.definition_en: A garden hose is a long tube used to water plants.
items.example_en: She used the garden hose to water the vegetables.

items.definition_en: A compost bin is a container for garden and food waste to create compost.
items.example_en: They put old leaves in the compost bin.
